reviews.review_description: I know its a early access game but improve the graphics and details of the environments and add a crouching feature to pick up items.  it's a little difficult to pick up items on the ground. I have to use my camera to knock it (power plug) around in order for me to pick it up. the camera isn't flashing to take shots. could you make it a easier way to find all the power plugs maybe add a indicator or whatever?
